1. Company Information

2. Contact Information

Telephone: +351 934 249 645

3. Authorized Representative

Managing Director(s):
Marie-Claire Grossen

4. Business Activity

Creative Moods, Lda. operates online event aggregation and discovery platforms:

  • https://lisboa.events
  • {{pushpull.home_url}}

The platforms provide:

  • Paid subscription services granting access to event listings
  • Advertising services for event organizers
  • Affiliate marketing partnerships
  • Promotional visibility services within Portugal, Switzerland and internationally

5. Territorial Scope

This website is operated from Portugal and targets customers in Portugal and in Switzerland, including pricing displayed in Euro and CHF.

Unless otherwise required by mandatory consumer protection law, services are governed by Portuguese law.

Swiss mandatory consumer protection provisions may apply where required.

6. Liability for Content

The contents of this website are created with due care. However, Creative Moods, Lda. assumes no liability for the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the information provided.

Event details are submitted by organizers or third parties. Responsibility for event accuracy lies with the respective organizer.

7. Liability for External Links

This website may contain links to external third-party websites. Creative Moods, Lda. has no influence over the content of those websites and assumes no responsibility for them. The respective provider or operator is always responsible for the content of linked pages.

8. Intellectual Property

All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and design elements, is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.

Any reproduction, distribution, or use beyond statutory limits requires prior written consent.

9. Data Protection

Information regarding the processing of personal data is available in our Privacy Policy.

Processing of personal data is carried out in compliance with:

  • The EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
  • The Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (FADP), where applicable
